title: SPBR - Revanilla
description: Reverts SPBR changes back to vanilla
body:
# SPBR - Revanilla SPBR - Revanilla is an add-on for SPBR that restores the textures and models differing from vanilla back to their original vanilla versions. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MPpKKeAK/images/a24216bd8c2840a3a15cee173d1ac3d5e3c2429a.jpeg) > Due to updates to `pack.mcemeta` in version 1.21.9, the minimum supported range can now only be displayed as 1.20.1 ~ 1.21.+. > **This pack is compatible with all versions supported by SPBR.** ## Modified Elements * Reverts the door item model back from 3D to the original. * Adds a PBR texture to the door item texture. * Reverts the 3D model changes made to chains and lantern chains. * Reverts the 3D model changes made to all types of rail blocks. * Reverts the ladder back from a 3D model to the original. * Reverts the mace from a 3D model to the original. * Changes the mace’s PBR texture. * Restores mob eyes to no longer emit light. * Reverts the changes made to the piston model. * Reverts the changes made to the sugar cane model and texture. * Reverts all tool item textures from albedo to the original. * Reverts the panorama to the original. * Reverts the mushroom to the original model. * Reverts the eating animation to the original. * Pickaxes, axes, hoes, shovels, and swords no longer use special textures when their durability is low. > Not all modifications made by SPBR are clearly documented, so some changes might have been missed. > If you find any such cases, please report them on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/D5zEJx3AFE). ## Panorama Since the panorama differs by version, we’ve separated the panorama changes into a standalone resource pack. Inside the resource pack folder, there is a `Panorama` folder containing panorama resource pack files for each version. Select the appropriate one for your version and move it to your resource pack folder to apply it. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MPpKKeAK/images/711c35c109282ae71adf8d1fc74658d7dcfc444a.png)
## Copyright
This resource pack is a sub-pack of SPBR, based on Vanilla Normal Renewed. Therefore, the ideas and structure of this pack are licensed under the GPL-3.0 license. https://www.patreon.com/Poudingue The PBR texture for the door and mace items is provided by Dominokorean's "PBR for Items" pack. This texture is not subject to the GPL-3.0 license and is credited under the CC BY 4.0 license of "PBR for Items."
